generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "measures hoist swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "measures wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AnemometerDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance AnemometerDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "hoist swinging motion data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance AnemometerData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "wind speed data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AnemometerDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "PostgreSQL-based time-series database for historical data storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "data visualization dashboard tool"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance MosquittoMQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for message transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance PythonGantrylib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python gantrylib module for physical control and data handling"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlService
]

instance CADModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "CAD modeling service for Fusion360"
    DTDFVocab:provides CADModelInsight
]

instance CADModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "CAD model insights for gantry crane design"
]

instance Fusion360 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Autodesk Fusion360 for CAD modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables CADModelingService
]

instance ArcadiaModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Arcadia system modeling service for architecture design"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemModelingInsight
]

instance SystemModelingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "system architecture modeling insights from Capella"
]

instance Capella : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Capella for Arcadia system modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables ArcadiaModelingService
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "containerization platform for service deployment"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, DataVisualizationService, TrajectoryGenerationService, ContinuousValidationService, SimulationService, ControlService
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "logs historical crane state and sensor data to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStorageInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "provides real-time data visualization via Grafana dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataVisualizationInsight
]

instance TrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "generates optimal trajectories using kinematic model for movement planning"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "compares real-time measurements with simulations for continuous validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationAlert
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "simulates crane dynamics for virtual commissioning"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance ControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "controls physical components via Python interface"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAction
]

instance DataStorageInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "historical data storage for analysis and reporting"
]

instance DataVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "real-time dashboard visualizations for operator monitoring"
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "optimal paths for crane movement to minimize time and energy"
]

instance ValidationAlert : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "alerts on discrepancies between simulation and real-time measurements"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "insights from dynamic simulation for system behavior analysis"
]

instance ControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "actuation commands for cart, hoist, and electromagnet"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model of the gantry crane created in Autodesk Fusion360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Fusion360
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "kinematic model for trajectory optimization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGenerationService
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "dynamics simulation model for virtual commissioning"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationService
]

instance CraneFrame : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "structural frame of the lab-scale gantry crane"
]

instance Arduino : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "microcontroller for sensor data acquisition and control"
]

instance CartMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for cart movement"
]

instance HoistMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for hoist movement"
]

instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "stepper motor for cart movement"
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "stepper motor for hoist movement"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "electromagnet for container pickup"
]

instance DigitalTwinSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "centralized digital twin system for the lab-scale gantry crane"
    base:contains SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, Arduino, CartMotorController, HoistMotorController, CartStepperMotor, HoistStepperMotor, Electromagnet, CraneFrame
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by Trajectory Generator Service and processed by Control Application, sent via Physical Crane Interface to motor controllers and electromagnet for physical movement execution."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous synchronization during crane operation with real-time data logging and simulation comparisons; specific time rates not documented but service operations occur in near real-time."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Centralized orchestration of physical crane components and digital services (database, dashboard, trajectory generator, simulation, validation) communicating via MQTT and shared database, deployed on a single personal computer using Docker for key services."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Primarily covers 'as operated' phase through continuous validation and monitoring during crane operation, with CAD models representing 'as designed' phase for simulation purposes."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service compares measured trajectory execution with simulations, calculates distance metrics against predefined thresholds, and uses time series classification techniques for fault localization."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT (Eclipse Mosquitto) for service-to-service communication; physical hardware interface protocols between crane and controller unspecified in documentation."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Deployed on a personal computer with Docker containerizing database, MQTT broker, and dashboard; gantrylib Python module installed via pip for remaining components."
]
